description: Tracks active open-source AI agent repositories from GitHub signals.

items.description: AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs

CowAgent是基于大模型的超级AI助理，能主动思考和任务规划、访问操作系统和外部资源、创造和执行Skills、拥有长期记忆并不断成长，比OpenClaw更轻量和便捷。同时支持微信、飞书、钉钉、企微、QQ、公众号、网页等接入，可选择OpenAI/Claude/Gemini/DeepSeek/ Qwen/GLM/Kimi/LinkAI，能处理文本、语音、图片和文件，可快速搭建个人AI助理和企业数字员工。

Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.
🦞 OpenClaw (Clawdbot/Moltbot) 汉化版 - 开源个人 AI 助手中文版 | Claude/ChatGPT LLM 接入 | WhatsApp/Telegram/Discord 多平台 | 每小时自动同步 | CLI + Dashboard 全中文 | 全流程搭建教程，以及排错指南！
【三年面试五年模拟】AIGC算法工程师面试秘籍。涵盖AIGC、LLM大模型、AI Agent、传统深度学习、自动驾驶、机器学习、计算机视觉、自然语言处理、强化学习、大数据挖掘、具身智能、元宇宙、AGI等AI行业面试笔试干货经验与核心知识。

A secure persistent personal agent server in Rust. One binary, sandboxed execution, multi-provider LLMs, voice, memory, Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, Teams, and MCP tools. Secure by design, runs on your hardware.
The AI Agent Workforce Platform — where teams scale beyond headcount. Give every team member an AI agent squad.
the easiest way to run natural language-described workflows automatically
Atom Agent, automate your workflows by talking to an AI — and let it remember, search, and handle tasks like a real assistant
AI-powered Werewolf (Mafia) social deduction game where every player is controlled by top LLMs like DeepSeek, Qwen, Gemini, and more
Give your AI agents persistent memory.
AI-powered offensive security agent. Autonomous pentesting with 13+ specialized agents, 120+ OWASP test cases, 15+ LLM providers, and Bolt remote tool servers. Your AI red team.
🚀 Feishu/Lark Docs、Sheet、Bitable <-> Markdown | AI Agent-friendly knowledge base exporter and writer with OAuth 2.0, CLI, TUI & Claude Skills support - 飞书文档 <写入/导出> Markdown | AI Agent 友好型导出-写入工具

The Mind Palace for AI Agents — Autonomous Cognitive OS with affect-tagged memory (valence engine), token-economic RL (surprisal gate + UBI), Hebbian learning, ACT-R spreading activation, Synapse Engine (GraphRAG), adversarial evaluation (anti-sycophancy), fail-closed Dark Factory pipelines. Zero-config local mode.
A governance harness for AI coding.
